top_tweets.text: What we call “taste” is just design literacy.
top_tweets.author: sopuruchn
top_tweets.name: sopuruchi
top_tweets.summary_zh: 品味其實就是設計素養。一句話點出設計鑑賞力的本質，對設計師和 PM 理解如何培養判斷力很有啟發。

top_tweets.text:
In America something called ‘Planned obsolescence’ has become a business model

Companies deliberate design products with a limited useful life to force repeat purchases

Companies like HP, Canon, Epson use chips that block printing even when ink remains, sometimes 20%+ left but https://t.co/kbjU3qSm7y
top_tweets.author: WallStreetApes
top_tweets.name: Wall Street Apes
top_tweets.summary_zh: 美國「計畫性報廢」已成商業模式，企業刻意設計產品壽命迫使重複購買。HP、Canon 等印表機廠商在墨水剩 20% 時就用晶片阻止列印，是產品設計倫理的反面教材。

top_tweets.text:
Vaseline disabled comments on the original post but doesn’t stop the community, glad to see it. 

One look at the product you can tell it’s Ai as it’s supposed to say “3X purified”, they obviously have nobody reviewing artwork… I’d be on the phone to a lawyer! https://t.co/RCU1NKxBVu
top_tweets.author: HeySnoogi
top_tweets.name: Snoogi
top_tweets.summary_zh: Vaseline 產品包裝明顯使用 AI 生成（「3X purified」拼錯），卻無人審查就上市，社群砲轟後官方關閉留言。反映企業在 AI 工具流程中缺乏品質把關的風險。

top_tweets.text:
This woman sold 64,000 bottles of her $32 holistic medicine product in the last month

That is over $2 million in revenue

And the craziest part?

She’s not even real

She’s an AI creator

Mamaariella posted the proof yesterday and I had to confirm it for myself.

This AI https://t.co/mvqnvhNOG0
top_tweets.author: iksly2
top_tweets.name: Kemi
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 虛擬網紅 Mamaariella 一個月賣出 64,000 瓶保健品（單價 32 美元，營收逾 200 萬美元），且「她」根本不存在。顯示 AI 人設在電商產品行銷的變現潛力與爭議。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: AgentPeek
top_products.author: Bren Huber
top_products.tagline: Claude Code and Codex in your Mac notch
top_products.summary_zh: 在 Mac 瀏海區域顯示 Claude Code 和 Codex 運作狀態的工具。讓開發者即時監控 AI 程式碼助手的執行情況。
